name: Winter Walker Spells
desc: When you reach a Ranger level specified in the Winter Walker Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

| Ranger Level | Spells |
| --- | --- |
| 3 | Ice Knife |
| 5 | Hold Person |
| 9 | Remove Curse |
| 13 | Ice Storm |
| 17 | Cone of Cold |
